image:image.image:title: Sheetal Sweets & Bakery — Case Study by Hammad Jagarala
image:image.image:caption: Responsive business website built with React, Node.js, Express.js and MySQL

image:image.image:title: Student Management System — Java Spring Boot REST API by Hammad Jagarala
image:image.image:caption: Production-grade REST API with JWT authentication and role-based access control
